Chinese: (游戏或运动的)队；(一起工作的)组，班
Collocation: team member; team work; football team
Example_EN: Our team won the basketball match yesterday.
Example_CN: 我们队昨天赢了篮球比赛。
MemoryTip: team 像 TEAM——Together Everyone Achieves More(一起努力，成就更多)。

Collocation: football player; basketball player; key player
Example_EN: He is the best player on the football team.
Example_CN: 他是足球队里最好的运动员。
MemoryTip: play(玩)+ er(人)→ 玩运动的人 → 运动员。

Collocation: tell him; give him; with him
Example_EN: Please give the book to him.
Example_CN: 请把这本书给他。
MemoryTip: he 的宾格形式，用在动词或介词后面。

Collocation: lovely day; lovely girl; lovely weather
Example_EN: What a lovely garden you have!
Example_CN: 你的花园真漂亮！
MemoryTip: love(爱)+ ly → 让人喜爱的 → 美丽的。

Collocation: clever boy; clever idea; clever trick
Example_EN: She is clever enough to solve the puzzle.
Example_CN: 她足够聪明，能解开这个谜题。
MemoryTip: clever 和 clean 都有 cl 开头，聪明的头脑是干净的。

Collocation: young people; young child; young age
Example_EN: My grandfather looks very young for his age.
Example_CN: 我爷爷看上去比实际年龄年轻很多。
MemoryTip: young 发音像羊，小羊代表年轻。

Collocation: hard-working student; hard-working employee
Example_EN: She is a hard-working student who always finishes her homework on time.
Example_CN: 她是一个勤奋的学生，总是按时完成作业。
MemoryTip: hard(努力)+ working(工作)→ 努力工作的 → 勤奋的。

Collocation: science class; science museum; computer science
Example_EN: I like science because we can do experiments.
Example_CN: 我喜欢科学课，因为我们可以做实验。
MemoryTip: sci(知道)+ ence → 探索知识的学科 → 科学。

Collocation: robot arm; robot vacuum; cleaning robot
Example_EN: The robot can help us do housework.
Example_CN: 这个机器人可以帮我们做家务。
MemoryTip: robot 发音像肉搏，机器人不怕肉搏。

Collocation: jump up; jump rope; jump over
Example_EN: The rabbit can jump very high.
Example_CN: 那只兔子能跳得很高。
MemoryTip: jump 像江普→ 跳过江，普通过。

Collocation: jump rope; climbing rope; rope ladder
Example_EN: We need a rope to tie the boat.
Example_CN: 我们需要一根绳子来拴住船。
MemoryTip: rope 发音像肉铺，肉铺里用绳子挂肉。

Collocation: play the piano; piano lesson; piano concert
Example_EN: She has been playing the piano since she was five.
Example_CN: 她从五岁起就开始弹钢琴了。
MemoryTip: piano 发音像皮阿诺，想象一个叫皮阿诺的人在弹钢琴。

Collocation: play chess; chess game; chess board
Example_EN: My father taught me how to play chess.
Example_CN: 我爸爸教我怎么下国际象棋。
MemoryTip: chess 发音像拆斯，下棋就是拆解对方的策略。

Collocation: in front of; front door; front seat
Example_EN: There is a big tree in front of the house.
Example_CN: 房子前面有一棵大树。
MemoryTip: front 和 frontier(前线)同源，都在前面。

Collocation: easy to use; easy money; take it easy
Example_EN: This question is very easy to answer.
Example_CN: 这个问题很容易回答。
MemoryTip: easy 像 E-Z(容易)，像ABC一样简单。

Collocation: movie star; pop star; star player
Example_EN: She dreams of becoming a movie star one day.
Example_CN: 她梦想有一天成为电影明星。
MemoryTip: star 本义是星星，引申为闪亮的明星。

Collocation: wonderful time; wonderful news; wonderful view
Example_EN: We had a wonderful time at the party.
Example_CN: 我们在派对上玩得很开心。
MemoryTip: wonder(奇迹)+ ful(充满)→ 充满奇迹的 → 精彩的。

Collocation: in Australia; Australia Day; Western Australia
Example_EN: Kangaroos live in Australia.
Example_CN: 袋鼠生活在澳大利亚。
MemoryTip: Australia 发音像澳斯吹利亚，澳大利亚在南半球。

Collocation: feel sad; sad story; sad news
Example_EN: She felt sad when her best friend moved away.
Example_CN: 她最好的朋友搬走后，她很难过。
MemoryTip: sad 三个字母，像眼泪流下的样子。

Collocation: What's the matter?; no matter; a matter of
Example_EN: What's the matter with you? You look pale.
Example_CN: 你怎么了？你脸色苍白。
MemoryTip: matter → What's the matter? 是最常用的关心用语。

Collocation: school project; project plan; project manager
Example_EN: We are working on a science project together.
Example_CN: 我们正在一起做一个科学项目。
MemoryTip: pro(向前)+ ject(投掷)→ 向前推进的事情 → 项目。

Collocation: city centre; shopping centre; sports centre
Example_EN: The shopping centre is in the middle of the city.
Example_CN: 购物中心在市中心。
MemoryTip: centre(英式拼写)= center(美式拼写)，意思相同。

Collocation: agree with; agree to; agree on
Example_EN: I agree with you that we should leave early.
Example_CN: 我同意你的看法，我们应该早点出发。
MemoryTip: agree with + 人；agree to + 事；agree on + 协商的事。

Collocation: finish homework; finish work; finish doing
Example_EN: I need to finish my homework before dinner.
Example_CN: 我需要在晚饭前完成作业。
MemoryTip: finish → fin(结束)+ ish → 把事情做完。

Collocation: on Monday; Monday morning; last Monday
Example_EN: We have a maths test every Monday.
Example_CN: 我们每周一都有数学测验。
MemoryTip: Mon(moon 月亮)+ day → 月亮日 → 星期一。

Collocation: worried about; be worried; look worried
Example_EN: My mother is worried about my health.
Example_CN: 我妈妈担心我的健康。
MemoryTip: worry(担心)+ ed → 正在担心的状态。

Collocation: both of us; both...and...; both sides
Example_EN: Both of my parents are teachers.
Example_CN: 我父母都是老师。
MemoryTip: both 指两者都，neither 指两者都不。

Collocation: excited about; get excited; feel excited
Example_EN: The children are excited about the trip to the zoo.
Example_CN: 孩子们对去动物园的旅行很兴奋。
MemoryTip: excite(使兴奋)+ d → 感到兴奋的。注意：exciting 是令人兴奋的。

Collocation: go wrong; wrong answer; something wrong
Example_EN: I'm sorry, but your answer is wrong.
Example_CN: 抱歉，你的答案是错的。
MemoryTip: wrong 发音像让，让别人发现你错了。

Collocation: angry with; angry about; get angry
Example_EN: My father was angry because I broke the window.
Example_CN: 我爸爸很生气，因为我打破了窗户。
MemoryTip: angry 像 ang(昂)→ 生气时昂起头。

Collocation: afraid of; be afraid; I'm afraid
Example_EN: She is afraid of the dark.
Example_CN: 她害怕黑暗。
MemoryTip: afraid → a + fraid → 一个让人害怕的幽灵。

Collocation: my parents; parent meeting; single parent
Example_EN: My parents always support my decisions.
Example_CN: 我父母总是支持我的决定。
MemoryTip: parent 复数 parents 通常指父母双亲。

Collocation: ask a question; ask for help; ask about
Example_EN: Don't be afraid to ask if you don't understand.
Example_CN: 不懂就问，不要害怕。
MemoryTip: ask → 啊，思考→ 问问题前先思考。

Collocation: move to; move away; move house
Example_EN: We are going to move to a new city next month.
Example_CN: 我们下个月要搬到新的城市。
MemoryTip: move 像木屋→ 搬木屋 → 搬家。

Chinese: 您的(用于书信结尾的签名前)
Collocation: Yours sincerely; Yours truly; of yours
Example_EN: Yours sincerely, Li Ming.
Example_CN: 您真诚的，李明。
MemoryTip: your + s → 你的东西(名词性物主代词)，后面不接名词。

Collocation: on Wednesday; Wednesday afternoon; last Wednesday
Example_EN: We have English class every Wednesday.
Example_CN: 我们每周三有英语课。
MemoryTip: Wed-nes-day 拼写中有 d 不发音，记成 Wed-nesday。

Collocation: school subject; favourite subject; subject area
Example_EN: My favourite subject is history.
Example_CN: 我最喜欢的学科是历史。
MemoryTip: sub(下面)+ ject(投掷)→ 放在下面的东西 → 学科主题。

Collocation: on Tuesday; Tuesday morning; next Tuesday
Example_EN: The meeting is scheduled for Tuesday afternoon.
Example_CN: 会议安排在周二下午。
MemoryTip: Tuesday 源自北欧战神 Tyr → 战神日。

Collocation: on Friday; Friday evening; last Friday
Example_EN: Thank God it's Friday!
Example_CN: 谢天谢地，终于周五了！
MemoryTip: Fri(自由？)+ day → 周五接近周末，马上自由了。

Collocation: because of; just because
Example_EN: I stayed at home because it was raining.
Example_CN: 我待在家，因为外面在下雨。
MemoryTip: be + cause(原因)→ 是原因 → 因为。

Collocation: on Thursday; Thursday night; every Thursday
Example_EN: We have a music lesson on Thursday.
Example_CN: 我们周四有音乐课。
MemoryTip: Thursday → Thor(雷神)+ day → 雷神日。

Collocation: start doing; start to; at the start
Example_EN: Let's start our lesson now.
Example_CN: 我们现在开始上课吧。
MemoryTip: start 和 star(星星)一词之差，星星出来时新的一天开始。

Collocation: usually do; as usually
Example_EN: I usually get up at seven o'clock.
Example_CN: 我通常七点起床。
MemoryTip: usual(通常的)+ ly → 通常地。

Collocation: at the weekend; on weekends; weekend trip
Example_EN: What do you usually do at the weekend?
Example_CN: 你周末通常做什么？
MemoryTip: week(周)+ end(结束)→ 一周的结束 → 周末。

Collocation: sometimes...sometimes...
Example_EN: Sometimes I walk to school, sometimes I take the bus.
Example_CN: 我有时走路去学校，有时坐公交。
MemoryTip: some(一些)+ times(时候)→ 一些时候 → 有时。

Collocation: on Saturday; Saturday morning; every Saturday
Example_EN: We always go shopping on Saturday.
Example_CN: 我们周六总是去购物。
MemoryTip: Saturday → Saturn(土星)+ day → 土星日。

Collocation: on Sunday; Sunday morning; every Sunday
Example_EN: Sunday is a day of rest for our family.
Example_CN: 周日是我们家的休息日。
MemoryTip: Sunday → Sun(太阳)+ day → 太阳日。

Collocation: English lesson; have a lesson; lesson plan
Example_EN: We have a piano lesson every Friday.
Example_CN: 我们每周五有钢琴课。
MemoryTip: lesson 发音像来森→ 来森林上课。

Collocation: in the evening; evening meal; good evening
Example_EN: We usually watch TV in the evening.
Example_CN: 我们晚上通常看电视。
MemoryTip: evening → even(平)+ ing → 太阳落平 → 傍晚。

Collocation: answer the question; answer the phone; correct answer
Example_EN: Please raise your hand if you know the answer.
Example_CN: 知道答案的同学请举手。
MemoryTip: answer → an + swer → 一个回答。

Collocation: play ping-pong; ping-pong table; ping-pong ball
Example_EN: Let's play ping-pong after school.
Example_CN: 放学后我们打乒乓球吧。
MemoryTip: ping-pong 是拟声词，模仿球碰撞的声音。

Collocation: at night; last night; good night
Example_EN: I like to read a book at night before sleeping.
Example_CN: 我喜欢晚上睡觉前读一会儿书。
MemoryTip: night 和 knight(骑士)同音，骑士在夜晚守护。

Collocation: visit friends; visit a museum; pay a visit
Example_EN: We are going to visit my grandparents this weekend.
Example_CN: 这个周末我们要去看望祖父母。
MemoryTip: visit → vis(看)+ it → 去看 → 拜访。

Chinese: 祖父；祖母；外祖父；外祖母
Collocation: my grandparents; visit grandparents; grandparent's house
Example_EN: My grandparents live in the countryside.
Example_CN: 我的祖父母住在乡下。
MemoryTip: grand(大的)+ parent(父母)→ 大的父母 → 祖父母。

Collocation: stay at home; stay calm; stay healthy
Example_EN: I decided to stay at home because of the rain.
Example_CN: 因为下雨，我决定待在家里。
MemoryTip: stay → s + tay → 在原地待着。

Collocation: should do; should be; you should
Example_EN: You should drink more water when you have a cold.
Example_CN: 感冒时你应该多喝水。
MemoryTip: should 是 shall 的过去式，但现在常用作情态动词表建议。

Collocation: have the flu; bird flu; flu season
Example_EN: I had the flu last week and missed three days of school.
Example_CN: 我上周得了流感，缺了三天课。
MemoryTip: flu 是 influenza 的缩写，发音像俘虏→ 被流感俘虏了。

Collocation: someone else; anything else; or else
Example_EN: Is there anything else you want to tell me?
Example_CN: 你还有什么别的想告诉我吗？
MemoryTip: else 常用于疑问词和不定代词后面：what else, who else, someone else。

Collocation: take exercise; do exercise; exercise book
Example_EN: Doing exercise every day is good for your health.
Example_CN: 每天锻炼对你的健康有好处。
MemoryTip: exercise → exer(向外)+ cise(切)→ 把多余的东西切掉 → 锻炼。

Collocation: enough time; good enough; enough money
Example_EN: We don't have enough time to finish the work.
Example_CN: 我们没有足够的时间来完成这项工作。
MemoryTip: enough 发音像一拿福→ 一拿就有福，足够了。

Collocation: if possible; if necessary; what if
Example_EN: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.
Example_CN: 如果明天下雨，我们就待在家。
MemoryTip: if 只有两个字母，是最短的条件句引导词。

Collocation: good habit; bad habit; eating habit
Example_EN: Reading before bed is a good habit.
Example_CN: 睡前读书是个好习惯。
MemoryTip: habit → hab(有)+ it → 拥有它成为习惯。

Collocation: TV show; talk show; game show
Example_EN: My favourite TV show is on at eight o'clock.
Example_CN: 我最喜欢的电视节目在八点播出。
MemoryTip: show 本义是展示，电视节目就是展示给观众看的。

Collocation: mobile phone; phone call; answer the phone
Example_EN: My phone rang while I was doing my homework.
Example_CN: 我在做作业时电话响了。
MemoryTip: phone 是 telephone 的缩写，发音像封→ 电话把声音封住传过去。

Collocation: and then; since then; by then
Example_EN: First we eat dinner, then we can watch TV.
Example_CN: 我们先吃晚饭，然后可以看电视。
MemoryTip: then → the + n → 然后就是下一个。

Collocation: take a rest; have a rest; rest time
Example_EN: You have been working all day. You need to rest.
Example_CN: 你工作了一整天，需要休息一下。
MemoryTip: rest → 在 restaurant(餐厅)里休息吃饭。

Collocation: take care of yourself; take care of the baby
Example_EN: My sister helps me take care of the dog.
Example_CN: 我妹妹帮我照顾狗。
Synonym: look after; care for; attend to
MemoryTip: take(拿)+ care(关心)+ of → 拿出关心来 → 照顾。

Collocation: check out; check the answer; check in
Example_EN: Please check your homework before handing it in.
Example_CN: 交作业前请检查一下。
MemoryTip: check 发音像拆客→ 拆开检查。

Chinese: (与不可数名词连用)较少的，更少的
Collocation: less money; less time; less and less
Example_EN: You should eat less sugar for your health.
Example_CN: 为了健康，你应该少吃糖。
MemoryTip: less 是 little 的比较级，用于不可数名词；fewer 用于可数名词。

Collocation: brush teeth; brush hair; brush off
Example_EN: You should brush your teeth twice a day.
Example_CN: 你应该每天刷两次牙。
MemoryTip: brush → b + rush → 刷东西要 rush(快)。

Collocation: brush teeth; tooth fairy; tooth decay
Example_EN: I have a loose tooth.
Example_CN: 我有一颗牙松了。
MemoryTip: tooth(单数)→ teeth(复数)，oo 变 ee，像 foot → feet。

Collocation: twice a day; twice a week; think twice
Example_EN: I go to the library twice a week.
Example_CN: 我每周去两次图书馆。
MemoryTip: twice → two + ice → 两次。once(一次)，twice(两次)，three times(三次)。

Collocation: an hour; half an hour; rush hour
Example_EN: It takes me an hour to finish my homework.
Example_CN: 我花一个小时完成作业。
MemoryTip: hour 中 h 不发音，发音和 our(我们的)一样。

Chinese: 没有安排活动的；空闲的
Collocation: free time; for free; feel free
Example_EN: I am free this Saturday. Let's play basketball!
Example_CN: 我这周六有空，我们去打篮球吧！
MemoryTip: free 有两个常见意思：空闲的和免费的。

Collocation: feel hungry; go hungry; hungry for
Example_EN: I'm so hungry that I could eat a horse.
Example_CN: 我饿得能吃下一匹马。
MemoryTip: hungry → hung(饿)+ ry → 肚子饿得咕咕叫。

Collocation: beef steak; roast beef; beef noodle
Example_EN: I'd like a bowl of beef noodles, please.
Example_CN: 我想要一碗牛肉面。
MemoryTip: beef 发音像必富→ 吃牛肉必富。

Collocation: ice cream cone; eat ice cream; vanilla ice cream
Example_EN: Children love eating ice cream in summer.
Example_CN: 夏天孩子们喜欢吃冰激凌。
MemoryTip: ice(冰)+ cream(奶油)→ 冰奶油 → 冰激凌。

Collocation: a little; little by little; very little
Example_EN: Can I have a little more rice, please?
Example_CN: 我能再要一点米饭吗？
MemoryTip: a little 用于不可数名词(一点)；a few 用于可数名词(几个)。

Collocation: make dumplings; eat dumplings; dumpling festival
Example_EN: We always make dumplings for the Spring Festival.
Example_CN: 我们春节总是包饺子。
MemoryTip: dumpling → dump + ling → 把馅料倒进面皮里。

Collocation: green tea; a cup of tea; afternoon tea
Example_EN: Would you like a cup of tea?
Example_CN: 你想来杯茶吗？
MemoryTip: tea 发音像替，茶可以替你提神。

Collocation: hamburger restaurant; chicken hamburger; eat hamburger
Example_EN: I had a hamburger and some fries for lunch.
Example_CN: 我午餐吃了一个汉堡和一些薯条。
MemoryTip: hamburger 源自德国城市 Hamburg，所以叫汉堡。

Chinese: 太太，夫人(用于女子的姓氏或姓名前)
Collocation: Mrs Smith; Mr and Mrs
Example_EN: Mrs Wang is our English teacher.
Example_CN: 王太太是我们的英语老师。
MemoryTip: Mrs 用于已婚女性，Miss 用于未婚女性，Ms 不表明婚姻状况。

Collocation: coconut tree; coconut milk; coconut oil
Example_EN: We drank fresh coconut water on the beach.
Example_CN: 我们在海滩上喝了新鲜的椰子水。
MemoryTip: coconut → coco(椰子)+ nut(坚果)→ 椰子坚果。

Collocation: interesting story; interesting place; find interesting
Example_EN: The book is so interesting that I can't put it down.
Example_CN: 这本书太有趣了，我爱不释手。
MemoryTip: interest(兴趣)+ ing → 令人感兴趣的。注意：interested 是感到有趣的。

Collocation: plant seeds; seed bank; seed of
Example_EN: We planted sunflower seeds in the garden.
Example_CN: 我们在花园里种了向日葵种子。
MemoryTip: seed → see + d → 看到种子种下去 → 种子。

Collocation: pull out; pull up; pull over
Example_EN: Can you help me pull these weeds out of the garden?
Example_CN: 你能帮我把花园里的杂草拔掉吗？
MemoryTip: pull(拉)vs push(推)，门上的 PULL / PUSH 标志。

Collocation: pull up weeds; pull up the plant
Example_EN: We pulled up all the dead plants in the garden.
Example_CN: 我们把花园里所有枯死的植物都拔了。
MemoryTip: pull(拉)+ up(向上)→ 向上拉 → 拔出。

Collocation: plant stem; flower stem; long stem
Example_EN: The rose has a long green stem with thorns.
Example_CN: 玫瑰花有长长的绿色茎，上面有刺。
MemoryTip: stem → s + tem → 植物的支撑 → 茎。

Collocation: tree root; root cause; take root
Example_EN: The roots of this tree go deep into the ground.
Example_CN: 这棵树的根深深扎入地下。
MemoryTip: root → roo + t → 像路一样深入地下 → 根。

Collocation: lotus flower; lotus leaf; lotus seed
Example_EN: The lotus flower is a symbol of purity in Chinese culture.
Example_CN: 莲花在中国文化中是纯洁的象征。
MemoryTip: lotus 发音像露特斯→ 露珠停在莲花上。

Collocation: West Lake; by the lake; lake water
Example_EN: We went boating on the lake last Sunday.
Example_CN: 上周日我们去湖上划船了。
MemoryTip: lake → la + ke → 像来客→ 湖上来客。

Collocation: all over the world; world peace; around the world
Example_EN: I want to travel around the world one day.
Example_CN: 我希望有一天能环游世界。
MemoryTip: world → wor + ld → 像我的→ 世界是我的。

Collocation: round table; round face; round shape
Example_EN: The moon is round and bright tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚的月亮又圆又亮。
MemoryTip: round → rou + nd → 像绕的→ 绕圈的 → 圆的。

Chinese: 不同的；有区别的；有差异的
Collocation: different from; different kinds; different ways
Example_EN: My opinion is different from yours.
Example_CN: 我的观点和你的不同。
MemoryTip: differ(不同)+ ent → 不同的。注意搭配：different from。

Collocation: way of life; by the way; in this way
Example_EN: Is there a better way to solve this problem?
Example_CN: 有更好的方法来解决这个问题吗？
MemoryTip: way 像路一样，引申为方法、途径。

Collocation: Yangtze River; by the river; river bank
Example_EN: There is a beautiful bridge over the river.
Example_CN: 河上有一座美丽的桥。
MemoryTip: river → ri + ver → 像来我→ 河流来我身边。

Collocation: mother nature; nature park; love nature
Example_EN: We should protect nature and the environment.
Example_CN: 我们应该保护大自然和环境。
MemoryTip: nature → nat(出生，天然的)+ ure → 天然的东西 → 大自然。

Collocation: Niagara Falls; waterfall view; beautiful waterfall
Example_EN: The waterfall is so high that it looks like a white curtain.
Example_CN: 瀑布很高，看起来像白色的帘子。
MemoryTip: water(水)+ fall(落下)→ 水落下来 → 瀑布。

Collocation: rain forest; forest park; in the forest
Example_EN: Many wild animals live in the forest.
Example_CN: 许多野生动物生活在森林里。
MemoryTip: forest → for + est → 为休息而存在的地方 → 森林。

Collocation: famous for; world famous; famous star
Example_EN: Beijing is famous for the Great Wall.
Example_CN: 北京以长城闻名。
MemoryTip: famous → fame(名声)+ ous → 有名声的。

Collocation: mountain climbing; mountain top; high mountain
Example_EN: We climbed to the top of the mountain and saw the sunrise.
Example_CN: 我们爬到山顶，看到了日出。
MemoryTip: mountain 发音像忙停→ 爬山忙到停下来 → 山。

Collocation: strong wind; wind power; cold wind
Example_EN: The wind is blowing hard outside.
Example_CN: 外面的风刮得很大。
MemoryTip: wind 发音像温的→ 温柔的风。注意动词 wind /waɪnd/ 读音不同。

Chinese: (尤指短程往返的)旅行，旅游，出行
Collocation: go on a trip; school trip; business trip
Example_EN: We are going on a school trip to the museum next week.
Example_CN: 下周我们要去博物馆进行学校旅行。
MemoryTip: trip → tri + p → 短途旅行。

Collocation: dangerous place; dangerous animal; extremely dangerous
Example_EN: It is dangerous to swim in this river.
Example_CN: 在这条河里游泳很危险。
MemoryTip: danger(危险)+ ous → 危险的。

Collocation: heavy rain; heavy traffic; heavy work
Example_EN: The heavy rain lasted for three hours.
Example_CN: 大雨持续了三个小时。
MemoryTip: heavy → heav(重)+ y → 重的。

Collocation: stay in a hotel; hotel room; five-star hotel
Example_EN: We stayed in a nice hotel near the beach.
Example_CN: 我们住在海滩附近一家不错的旅馆。
MemoryTip: hotel → ho + tel → 像候台→ 等候旅客的楼台。

Collocation: close the door; close your eyes; close down
Example_EN: Please close the window. It's cold outside.
Example_CN: 请关上窗户，外面冷。
MemoryTip: close 作动词读 /kləʊz/，作形容词(近的)读 /kləʊs/。

Collocation: take an umbrella; under the umbrella; folding umbrella
Example_EN: Don't forget to take your umbrella. It might rain.
Example_CN: 别忘了带伞，可能要下雨。
MemoryTip: umbrella → um + brella → 像俺不来了→ 下雨没伞俺不来了。

Collocation: wear a raincoat; put on a raincoat
Example_EN: I wore my raincoat because it was raining heavily.
Example_CN: 我穿了雨衣，因为雨下得很大。
MemoryTip: rain(雨)+ coat(外套)→ 防雨的外套 → 雨衣。

Collocation: worry about; don't worry; worry too much
Example_EN: Don't worry about the exam. You will do fine.
Example_CN: 别担心考试，你会考好的。
MemoryTip: worry → wor + ry → 像无力→ 担心让人无力。

Collocation: fine weather; fine day; I'm fine
Example_EN: It's a fine day for a picnic.
Example_CN: 今天是个晴朗的野餐好天气。
MemoryTip: fine 有多个意思：晴朗的、好的、精致的。

Collocation: heavy fog; foggy day; in the fog
Example_EN: The fog was so thick that we couldn't see the road.
Example_CN: 雾太大了，我们看不清路。
MemoryTip: fog → f + og → 像雾→ 雾蒙蒙。

Collocation: flood control; flood area; heavy flood
Example_EN: The heavy rain caused a flood in the village.
Example_CN: 暴雨导致村庄发生了洪水。
MemoryTip: flood → fl + ood → 像浮了→ 水浮上来了 → 洪水。

Collocation: on fire; fire station; fire alarm
Example_EN: Call 119 if there is a fire.
Example_CN: 如果发生火灾，请拨打119。
MemoryTip: fire → fi + re → 像飞热→ 火飞起来很热。

Collocation: know about; get to know; you know
Example_EN: Do you know the answer to this question?
Example_CN: 你知道这个问题的答案吗？
MemoryTip: know 中 k 不发音，和 no 同音。

Collocation: before long; the day before; before and after
Example_EN: Please wash your hands before eating.
Example_CN: 吃饭前请洗手。
MemoryTip: be(在)+ fore(前面)→ 在前面 → 在……之前。

Collocation: go hiking in the mountains; like hiking; hiking trail
Example_EN: We went hiking in the forest last weekend.
Example_CN: 上周末我们去森林里徒步旅行了。
MemoryTip: go hiking → hiking 来自 hike(远足)，go + doing 表示去做某事。

Collocation: bring back; bring up; bring with
Example_EN: Please bring your textbook to class tomorrow.
Example_CN: 明天请把课本带到课堂上来。
MemoryTip: bring(带来)vs take(带走)：bring 是向说话者方向带来，take 是从说话者处带走。
